deferred: give_away: multi-word phrase from _INIT_MUT_SUBTRACT_VERBS; needs phrase-level lexicon support
pick_up: multi-word phrase from _INIT_MUT_ADD_VERBS; needs phrase-level lexicon support
aggregate_modifier category (in_all, altogether, combined): multi-word forms; not in single-token source whitelist
question_continuous_qty (much, long, far, old): not attested as isolated constants in math_candidate_parser.py; requires reader Phase 2 ratification
question_discrete_qty (many): not a standalone constant; deferred until reader integration
question_comparative (more, less, longer, fewer): from ADR-0164 table but not extracted as closed set in parser source
distributive_modifier (each, per): from ADR-0164 table; not in parser source as closed set
count_unit_noun: dynamic open class (apples, books, kids); not a fixed whitelist; deferred by design
time_unit_noun: available in _TIME_UNIT_SET but not in brief's required categories; deferred to Phase 3
